headline: Jim Cramer on Solstice: “This Pullback May Be Giving You a Terrific Buying Opportunity”
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:SOLS) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he highlighted the AI opportunities in neoclouds. Cramer highlighted the company’s latest acquisition plans, as he said: In early May, we had two different specialty chemical companies on the show: Solstice Advanced Materials, which had recently spun off by Honeywell, […]
